title: Philip Brain Associates Limited surrenders Ofqual recognition
body: "Philip Brain Associates Limited, trading as Extractives and Mineral Processing Industries Awards (EMPI Awards), has surrendered its status as an Ofqual-recognised awarding organisation.  The surrender takes effect as of 27 March 2025. From this date, Philip Brain Associates Limited is not recognised by Ofqual to deliver end-point assessment on any regulated standards. "
